message:
fix(decision): Resolve AlphaInvesting race condition and fix VOI/Supervision tests.

- fix(alpha_investing): Handle race condition where lock file is deleted between check and remove by retrying loop. Treat empty/corrupted lock file as Valid to prevent race with creation.
- fix(expected_loss): Make Action::ALL public crate-wide and derive Deserialize for ExpectedLoss (required for VOI).
- fix(supervision): Add sleep to integration tests to allow exec environment update to propagate.
- fix(voi): Increase confidence thresholds in tests to match logic.
